content:
About Hampton's Rest B&B

Hampton's Rest is a family-run bed and breakfast located on the Sky Road in Clifden, Connemara, County Galway. Owned by Joan Hampton, a community midwife with HSE West, the B&B offers guests a warm and personal welcome in one of Ireland's most beautiful landscapes.

Situated at the edge of the Atlantic, Hampton's Rest is the perfect base for walking the Sky Road loop, exploring the wild bogs and coastline of Connemara, or simply resting after a long journey west. Joan and her family have been welcoming guests to Clifden for over a decade.

Joan brings the same attentiveness to her guests that she brings to her clinical work — every detail matters, from the quality of the breakfast to the comfort of the rooms.
title: About

content:
Contact Hampton's Rest B&B

We would love to hear from you. To enquire about availability or make a booking, please use the details below.

  • Address: Hampton's Rest, Sky Road, Clifden, Co. Galway, H71 XK32, Ireland
  • Phone: +353 95 5343444
  • Email: stay@hamptonsrest.ie

For general enquiries about the birth centre campaign or midwifery services, please contact Joan via her professional email at joan.hampton@Finthesiss.ai.

Hampton's Rest is located on the Sky Road, approximately 3 km west of Clifden town centre. Follow the signs for the Sky Road loop from the main street.
title: Contact

content:
Rooms & Pricing

Hampton's Rest offers three comfortable en-suite guest rooms, each with views of the Connemara landscape or the Atlantic coast.

  • Connemara Suite — Double room with sea view. From €110 per night including full Irish breakfast.
  • Sky Road Room — Twin or double with garden outlook. From €95 per night including full Irish breakfast.
  • Clifden Garden Room — Single or double, ground floor access. From €85 per night including full Irish breakfast.

All rates include a full traditional Irish breakfast using local produce. A minimum two-night stay is requested during peak season. Please contact us directly for availability and long-stay rates.

Note: Hampton's Rest operates seasonally. Please check availability before booking.
title: Pricing
